description: Checks recall of durable travel logistics and seat preference across later planning turns.

timeline.user: For work travel, my home airport is SFO.
I usually prefer an aisle seat on flights.

timeline.query: Draft a quick flight search note for my next work trip.

evaluation.scoring_rubric: The answer should include durable travel logistics without inventing a destination.

probe.command: SEARCH CONCEPT "home airport SFO work travel" MODE "semantic" THRESHOLD 0.6 LIMIT 10

expected_memories.description: User prefers aisle seats on flights.

probe.command: SEARCH CONCEPT "flight aisle seat preference" MODE "semantic" THRESHOLD 0.6 LIMIT 10
